title: Esho Maa Lakshmi
desc: A tale of Goddess Lakshmi that describes her divine origin, celestial beauty, and role as the bestower of wealth and prosperity in Hindu mythology.

title: Esho Maa Lakshmi
desc: A tale of Goddess Lakshmi that describes her divine origin, celestial beauty, and role as the bestower of wealth and prosperity in Hindu mythology.

title: Anjali
desc: A devout father arranges his daughter's marriage with a renowned businessman. However, the daughter secretly resents the union as she is madly in love with her boyfriend.

title: Baba Keno Chakar
desc: When Rajnarayan asks his son to help out with the expenses for his sister's wedding, he refuses. As a result, he is forced to go from pillar to post to make ends meet.

title: Abhimanyu
desc: Raj Sinha, a policeman, kills gangster Durjo Rai's son in an encounter. He soon asks Abhimanyu, a suspended colleague, to protect the last two members of his family from Rai.

title: Debibaran
desc: Satyapriyo fights for justice when his sister is raped. During his fight, he takes on a corrupt village official in a twisted turn of events.
